```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Clean ---------------------------------------------------------------
rm(list = ls())

# Libraries ---------------------------------------------------------------
# region Libraries_and_data
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stargazer)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(stringr)
library(fixest)
library(purrr)
library(did)
options(knitr.table.format = "latex")

my_colors <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(4, "Pastel1")[1:2]
myblue <- "#2F5597"
myred <- "#B2182B"

dsd <- readRDS("data/panel_stayers_9-12_2004_2024.rds")
s <- readRDS("data/panel_simce_2medio_2006_2024.rds")

clustering_strategy <- ~ rbd + year
clustering_var <- "rbd"
init_year <- 2010
end_year <- 2021
# or
# clustering_strategy <- ~ rbd
# endregion
```

```{r create_df_by_rbd, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# region Create_df_by_rbd
dr <- dsd %>%
  filter(!is.na(nom_rbd) & is_private > -Inf) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    scored_lm = coalesce(scored_lm, 0),
    prom_gral = coalesce(prom_gral, 0),
    att = coalesce(att, 0),
    prom_lm_actual = coalesce(lm_pct, 0),
    applied = coalesce(applied, 0),
    assigned = coalesce(assigned, 0),
    enrolled = coalesce(enrolled, 0)
  ) %>%
  filter(year_start >= init_year & year_start <= end_year) %>%
  group_by(rbd, year_start) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    nom_rbd = first(nom_rbd),
    cod_reg_rbd = first(cod_reg_rbd),
    year_first_sae = min(rbd_first_sae),
    region_first_sae = min(region_first_sae),
    num_students = n_distinct(mrun),
    prom_gral = mean(prom_gral, na.rm = TRUE),
    att = mean(att, na.rm = TRUE),
    is_female = mean(is_female, na.rm = TRUE),
    is_low_income = mean(is_low_income, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_lm = mean(prom_lm_actual, na.rm = TRUE),
    scored_lm = mean(scored_lm, na.rm = TRUE),
    applied = mean(applied, na.rm = TRUE),
    assigned = mean(assigned, na.rm = TRUE),
    enrolled = mean(enrolled, na.rm = TRUE),
    is_private = max(is_private, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(year = year_start) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    treated = ifelse(year >= year_first_sae & year_first_sae < 2026, 1, 0),
    post_sae = ifelse(year >= region_first_sae, 1, 0),
    in_sae = ifelse(year_first_sae < 2026, 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  left_join(s %>% dplyr::select(-nom_rbd) %>% dplyr::mutate(in_simce = 1), by = c("rbd", "year")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    in_simce = coalesce(in_simce, 0),
    nalu_lect2m_rbd = coalesce(nalu_lect2m_rbd, 0),
    nalu_mate2m_rbd = coalesce(nalu_mate2m_rbd, 0),
    prom_lect2m_rbd = coalesce(prom_lect2m_rbd, 0),
    prom_mate2m_rbd = coalesce(prom_mate2m_rbd, 0),
    avg_lm_simce = (prom_lect2m_rbd + prom_mate2m_rbd) / 2
  ) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(is_private, -avg_lm_simce) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(rank_lm_simce = row_number()) %>%
  dplyr::select(-cod_reg_rbd.y) %>%
  dplyr::rename(cod_reg_rbd = cod_reg_rbd.x) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  as.data.frame()

# endregion

# dr %>% filter(is.na(nom_rbd))
# #
# dr %>% filter(year == 2015) %>% dplyr::select(rbd, nom_rbd, rank_lm_simce, avg_lm_simce, is_private )
#
# dr %>% group_by(is_private > -Inf) %>% tally()
```


# Staggered DID: Callaway - Sant'Anna (2005)

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# region make_did_table
make_did_table <- function(models,
                           caption = "Regression Results",
                           label = "tab:main_results",
                           cluster_var = "rbd",
                           fe_vars = c("rbd", "year"),
                           digits = 3,
                           means_pre = NULL,
                           means_map = NULL,
                           obs = NULL) {
  # Helper: significance stars
  star_fun <- function(att, se) {
    pval <- 2 * pnorm(-abs(att / se))
    ifelse(pval < 0.01, "$^{***}$",
      ifelse(pval < 0.05, "$^{**}$",
        ifelse(pval < 0.10, "$^{*}$", "")
      )
    )
  }

  # Aggregate all models (robust to NULL / failing models)
  aggs <- lapply(models, function(m) {
    if (is.null(m)) {
      return(list(overall.att = NA_real_, overall.se = NA_real_))
    }
    tryCatch(aggte(m, type = "simple"), error = function(e) {
      warning("aggte failed for one model: ", conditionMessage(e))
      list(overall.att = NA_real_, overall.se = NA_real_)
    })
  })

  # Extract ATT and SE
  atts <- sapply(aggs, function(x) x$overall.att)
  ses <- sapply(aggs, function(x) x$overall.se)

  stars <- mapply(star_fun, atts, ses)
  stars[is.na(stars)] <- ""

  att_fmt <- sprintf(paste0("%.", digits, "f%s"), atts, stars)
  se_fmt <- sprintf(paste0("(%.", digits, "f)"), ses)

  # Column names from list names
  colnames <- names(models)
  k <- length(models)

  # Column numbering
  col_numbers <- paste0("(", 1:k, ")", collapse = " & ")
  col_header <- paste(colnames, collapse = " & ")
  att_row <- paste(att_fmt, collapse = " & ")
  se_row <- paste(se_fmt, collapse = " & ")
  # Observations: allow user to pass `obs` (like `means_pre`) or fall back to legacy behavior
  if (!is.null(obs)) {
    # normalize helper
    norm_name <- function(x) tolower(gsub("[^[:alnum:]]", "", x))

    # Accept a data.frame (take first row) or a named vector/list
    if (is.data.frame(obs)) {
      obs_row_raw <- as.list(obs[1, , drop = TRUE])
    } else if (is.list(obs) && !is.null(names(obs))) {
      obs_row_raw <- as.list(obs)
    } else {
      obs_row_raw <- as.list(obs)
    }
    obs_names <- names(obs_row_raw)

    # If named, try to map display names to obs names by exact or normalized match
    if (!is.null(obs_names)) {
      norm_obs <- setNames(obs_names, vapply(obs_names, norm_name, ""))
      vars <- sapply(colnames, function(dn) {
        if (dn %in% obs_names) {
          return(dn)
        }
        nn <- norm_name(dn)
        if (nn %in% names(norm_obs)) {
          return(norm_obs[[nn]])
        }
        return(NA_character_)
      }, USE.NAMES = FALSE)

      obs_vals <- sapply(vars, function(v) {
        if (!is.null(v) && !is.na(v) && v %in% obs_names) {
          as.numeric(obs_row_raw[[v]])
        } else {
          NA_real_
        }
      })
    } else {
      # unnamed: allow scalar or vector matching k columns
      if (length(obs_row_raw) == 1L) {
        obs_vals <- rep(as.numeric(obs_row_raw[[1]]), k)
      } else if (length(obs_row_raw) == k) {
        obs_vals <- as.numeric(unlist(obs_row_raw))
      } else {
        obs_vals <- rep(NA_real_, k)
      }
    }

    obs_fmt <- sapply(obs_vals, function(x) ifelse(is.na(x), "NA", format(x, big.mark = ",")))
    obs_row <- paste(obs_fmt, collapse = " & ")
  } else {
    # legacy: Find first model with an 'n' field and repeat it across columns
    n_raw <- NA_integer_
    for (m in models) {
      if (!is.null(m) && !is.null(m$n)) {
        n_raw <- m$n
        break
      }
    }
    if (is.na(n_raw)) {
      n_obs_val <- NA_character_
    } else {
      n_obs_val <- format(n_raw, big.mark = ",")
    }
    obs_row <- paste(rep(ifelse(is.na(n_obs_val), "NA", n_obs_val), k), collapse = " & ")
  }
  # Mean pre-treatment row (if provided)
  if (!is.null(means_pre)) {
    # normalize helper
    norm_name <- function(x) tolower(gsub("[^[:alnum:]]", "", x))

    # Accept a data.frame (take first row) or a named vector/list
    if (is.data.frame(means_pre)) {
      means_row_raw <- as.list(means_pre[1, , drop = TRUE])
    } else if (is.list(means_pre) && !is.null(names(means_pre))) {
      means_row_raw <- as.list(means_pre)
    } else {
      means_row_raw <- as.list(means_pre)
    }
    means_names <- names(means_row_raw)

    # If user provided an explicit map, use it (named vector: display_name -> var_name)
    if (!is.null(means_map)) {
      vars <- unname(means_map[colnames])
    } else {
      # try to match model display names to means column names by normalized matching
      norm_means <- setNames(means_names, vapply(means_names, norm_name, ""))
      vars <- sapply(colnames, function(dn) {
        # direct match
        if (dn %in% means_names) {
          return(dn)
        }
        # normalized match
        nn <- norm_name(dn)
        if (nn %in% names(norm_means)) {
          return(norm_means[[nn]])
        }
        # no match
        return(NA_character_)
      }, USE.NAMES = FALSE)
    }

    means_vals <- sapply(vars, function(v) {
      if (!is.null(v) && !is.na(v) && v %in% means_names) {
        as.numeric(means_row_raw[[v]])
      } else {
        NA_real_
      }
    })
    means_fmt <- sprintf(paste0("%.", digits, "f"), means_vals)
    means_row <- paste(means_fmt, collapse = " & ")
  } else {
    means_row <- paste(rep("", k), collapse = " & ")
  }
  fe_rows <- paste0(
    sapply(fe_vars, function(v) {
      paste0(
        "      ", v, " & ",
        paste(rep("$\\checkmark$", k), collapse = " & "),
        "\\\\\n"
      )
    }),
    collapse = ""
  )

  # Build LaTeX table
  latex_table <- paste0(
    "\\begin{table}[htbp]\n",
    "   \\caption{", caption, "}\\label{", label, "}\n",
    "   \\bigskip\n",
    "   \\centering\n",
    "   \\begin{tabular}{l", paste(rep("c", k), collapse = ""), "}\n",
    "      \\toprule\n",
    "                   & ", col_header, "\\\\\n",
    "                   & ", col_numbers, "\\\\\n",
    "      \\midrule\n",
    "      Treated      & ", att_row, "\\\\\n",
    "                   & ", se_row, "\\\\\n",
    "      Mean pre-treatment & ", means_row, "\\\\\n",
    "       \\\\\n",
    "      Observations & ", obs_row, "\\\\\n",
    "       \\\\\n",
    fe_rows,
    "      \\bottomrule\n",
    "   \\end{tabular}\n",
    "\\end{table}"
  )

  return(latex_table)
}
# endregion
```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
gpa <- att_gt(
  yname = "prom_gral",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dr %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

lm <- att_gt(
  yname = "avg_lm",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dr %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

app <- att_gt(
  yname = "applied",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dr %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

ass <- att_gt(
  yname = "assigned",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dr %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

enr <- att_gt(
  yname = "enrolled",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dr %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

means_pre <- dr %>%
  filter(in_sae == 1, year < year_first_sae) %>%
  summarise(
    "GPA" = mean(prom_gral, na.rm = TRUE),
    "Average LM" = mean(avg_lm, na.rm = TRUE),
    "Applied" = mean(applied, na.rm = TRUE),
    "Assigned" = mean(assigned, na.rm = TRUE),
    "Enrolled" = mean(enrolled, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

obs <- dr %>%
  summarise(
    "GPA" = n(),
    "Average LM" = n(),
    "Applied" = n(),
    "Assigned" = n(),
    "Enrolled" = n()
  )
```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
models_list <- list(
  GPA = gpa,
  "Average LM" = lm,
  Applied = app,
  Assigned = ass,
  Enrolled = enr
)

latex_code <- make_did_table(models_list, means_pre = means_pre, obs = obs)

cat(latex_code)
```


# Heterogeneity

## Gender
```{r gender_data, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
df <- dsd %>%
  filter(!is.na(nom_rbd) & is_private > -Inf) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    year_first_sae = min(rbd_first_sae),
    region_first_sae = min(region_first_sae),
    treated = ifelse(year >= year_first_sae & year_first_sae < 2026, 1, 0),
    post_sae = ifelse(year >= region_first_sae, 1, 0),
    in_sae = ifelse(year_first_sae < 2026, 1, 0),
    is_female = ifelse(gen_alu == 2, 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  filter(is_female == 1) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    scored_lm = coalesce(scored_lm, 0),
    prom_gral = coalesce(prom_gral, 0),
    att = coalesce(att, 0),
    prom_lm_actual = coalesce(lm_pct, 0),
    applied = coalesce(applied, 0),
    assigned = coalesce(assigned, 0),
    enrolled = coalesce(enrolled, 0)
  ) %>%
  filter(year_start >= init_year & year_start <= end_year) %>%
  group_by(rbd, gen_alu, year_start) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    nom_rbd = first(nom_rbd),
    year_first_sae = min(rbd_first_sae),
    region_first_sae = min(region_first_sae),
    num_students = n_distinct(mrun),
    prom_gral = mean(prom_gral, na.rm = TRUE),
    att = mean(att, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_lm = mean(prom_lm_actual, na.rm = TRUE),
    scored_lm = mean(scored_lm, na.rm = TRUE),
    applied = mean(applied, na.rm = TRUE),
    assigned = mean(assigned, na.rm = TRUE),
    enrolled = mean(enrolled, na.rm = TRUE),
    is_private = max(is_private, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(year = year_start) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    treated = ifelse(year >= year_first_sae & year_first_sae < 2026, 1, 0),
    post_sae = ifelse(year >= region_first_sae, 1, 0),
    in_sae = ifelse(year_first_sae < 2026, 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  left_join(s %>% dplyr::select(-nom_rbd) %>% dplyr::mutate(in_simce = 1), by = c("rbd", "year")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    in_simce = coalesce(in_simce, 0),
    nalu_lect2m_rbd = coalesce(nalu_lect2m_rbd, 0),
    nalu_mate2m_rbd = coalesce(nalu_mate2m_rbd, 0),
    prom_lect2m_rbd = coalesce(prom_lect2m_rbd, 0),
    prom_mate2m_rbd = coalesce(prom_mate2m_rbd, 0),
    avg_lm_simce = (prom_lect2m_rbd + prom_mate2m_rbd) / 2
  ) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(is_private, -avg_lm_simce) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(rank_lm_simce = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  as.data.frame()


dm <- dsd %>%
  filter(!is.na(nom_rbd) & is_private > -Inf) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    year_first_sae = min(rbd_first_sae),
    region_first_sae = min(region_first_sae),
    treated = ifelse(year >= year_first_sae & year_first_sae < 2026, 1, 0),
    post_sae = ifelse(year >= region_first_sae, 1, 0),
    in_sae = ifelse(year_first_sae < 2026, 1, 0),
    is_female = ifelse(gen_alu == 2, 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  filter(is_female == 0) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    scored_lm = coalesce(scored_lm, 0),
    prom_gral = coalesce(prom_gral, 0),
    att = coalesce(att, 0),
    prom_lm_actual = coalesce(lm_pct, 0),
    applied = coalesce(applied, 0),
    assigned = coalesce(assigned, 0),
    enrolled = coalesce(enrolled, 0)
  ) %>%
  filter(year_start >= init_year & year_start <= end_year) %>%
  group_by(rbd, gen_alu, year_start) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    nom_rbd = first(nom_rbd),
    year_first_sae = min(rbd_first_sae),
    region_first_sae = min(region_first_sae),
    num_students = n_distinct(mrun),
    prom_gral = mean(prom_gral, na.rm = TRUE),
    att = mean(att, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_lm = mean(prom_lm_actual, na.rm = TRUE),
    scored_lm = mean(scored_lm, na.rm = TRUE),
    applied = mean(applied, na.rm = TRUE),
    assigned = mean(assigned, na.rm = TRUE),
    enrolled = mean(enrolled, na.rm = TRUE),
    is_private = max(is_private, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(year = year_start) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    treated = ifelse(year >= year_first_sae & year_first_sae < 2026, 1, 0),
    post_sae = ifelse(year >= region_first_sae, 1, 0),
    in_sae = ifelse(year_first_sae < 2026, 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  left_join(s %>% dplyr::select(-nom_rbd) %>% dplyr::mutate(in_simce = 1), by = c("rbd", "year")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    in_simce = coalesce(in_simce, 0),
    nalu_lect2m_rbd = coalesce(nalu_lect2m_rbd, 0),
    nalu_mate2m_rbd = coalesce(nalu_mate2m_rbd, 0),
    prom_lect2m_rbd = coalesce(prom_lect2m_rbd, 0),
    prom_mate2m_rbd = coalesce(prom_mate2m_rbd, 0),
    avg_lm_simce = (prom_lect2m_rbd + prom_mate2m_rbd) / 2
  ) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(is_private, -avg_lm_simce) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(rank_lm_simce = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  as.data.frame()
```

```{r gender_estimation, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
gpa_m <- att_gt(
  yname = "prom_gral",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dm %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

lm_m <- att_gt(
  yname = "avg_lm",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dm %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

app_m <- att_gt(
  yname = "applied",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dm %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

ass_m <- att_gt(
  yname = "assigned",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dm %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

enr_m <- att_gt(
  yname = "enrolled",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dm %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)


gpa_f <- att_gt(
  yname = "prom_gral",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = df %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

lm_f <- att_gt(
  yname = "avg_lm",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = df %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

app_f <- att_gt(
  yname = "applied",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = df %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

ass_f <- att_gt(
  yname = "assigned",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = df %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

enr_f <- att_gt(
  yname = "enrolled",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = df %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)
```



```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
means_fm <- cbind(
  df %>%
    filter(in_sae == 1, year < year_first_sae) %>%
    summarise(
      "GPA F" = mean(prom_gral, na.rm = TRUE),
      "Average LM F" = mean(avg_lm, na.rm = TRUE),
      "Applied F" = mean(applied, na.rm = TRUE),
      "Assigned F" = mean(assigned, na.rm = TRUE),
      "Enrolled F" = mean(enrolled, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
  dm %>%
    filter(in_sae == 1, year < year_first_sae) %>%
    summarise(
      "GPA M" = mean(prom_gral, na.rm = TRUE),
      "Average LM M" = mean(avg_lm, na.rm = TRUE),
      "Applied M" = mean(applied, na.rm = TRUE),
      "Assigned M" = mean(assigned, na.rm = TRUE),
      "Enrolled M" = mean(enrolled, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    "GPA F",        "GPA M",
    "Average LM F", "Average LM M",
    "Applied F",    "Applied M",
    "Assigned F",   "Assigned M",
    "Enrolled F",   "Enrolled M"
  )

obs_fm <- cbind(
  df %>%
    summarise(
      "GPA F" = n(),
      "Average LM F" = n(),
      "Applied F" = n(),
      "Assigned F" = n(),
      "Enrolled F" = n()
    ),
  dm %>%
    summarise(
      "GPA M" = n(),
      "Average LM M" = n(),
      "Applied M" = n(),
      "Assigned M" = n(),
      "Enrolled M" = n()
    )
) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    "GPA F",        "GPA M",
    "Average LM F", "Average LM M",
    "Applied F",    "Applied M",
    "Assigned F",   "Assigned M",
    "Enrolled F",   "Enrolled M"
  )

models_fm <- list(
  "GPA F" = gpa_f,
  "GPA M" = gpa_m,
  "Average LM F" = lm_f,
  "Average LM M" = lm_m,
  "Applied F" = app_f,
  "Applied M" = app_m,
  "Assigned F" = ass_f,
  "Assigned M" = ass_m,
  "Enrolled F" = enr_f,
  "Enrolled M" = enr_m
)

latex_code <- make_did_table(models_fm, means_pre = means_fm, obs = obs_fm)

cat(latex_code)
```


## Quality of School

```{r hist_2015_avg_lm_simce, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=4, fig.cap="Distribution of avg_lm_simce in 2015 by SAE membership", fig.pos='H'}
# Prepare data for 2015
plot_data <- dr %>%
  dplyr::filter(year == 2015) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(in_sae = factor(in_sae, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Not in SAE", "In SAE")))

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = avg_lm_simce, fill = in_sae)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), position = "identity", alpha = 0.5, bins = 30, color = NA) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.2, adjust = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Not in SAE" = myblue, "In SAE" = myred)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    x = "Average LM (SIMCE)", y = "Density", fill = "Group",
    title = "Distribution of avg_lm_simce (2015): SAE vs non-SAE"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")
```

```{r simce_quality, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
## compute percentile thresholds among schools in SAE in 2015
pct_q <- dr %>%
  dplyr::filter(year == 2015, in_sae == 1) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(cod_reg_rbd) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    p25 = quantile(avg_lm_simce, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    p50 = quantile(avg_lm_simce, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE),
    p75 = quantile(avg_lm_simce, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    p90 = quantile(avg_lm_simce, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE),
    p99 = quantile(avg_lm_simce, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

dh <- dr %>%
  left_join(pct_q, by = "cod_reg_rbd") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    top_25_simce = ifelse(!is.na(avg_lm_simce) & avg_lm_simce >= p25, 1, 0),
    top_50_simce = ifelse(!is.na(avg_lm_simce) & avg_lm_simce >= p50, 1, 0),
    top_75_simce = ifelse(!is.na(avg_lm_simce) & avg_lm_simce >= p75, 1, 0),
    top_90_simce = ifelse(!is.na(avg_lm_simce) & avg_lm_simce >= p90, 1, 0),
    top_99_simce = ifelse(!is.na(avg_lm_simce) & avg_lm_simce >= p99, 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0))
```


```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
gpa_top <- att_gt(
  yname = "prom_gral",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dh %>% filter(top_50_simce == 1),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)


lm_top <- att_gt(
  yname = "avg_lm",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dh %>% filter(top_50_simce == 1),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

app_top <- att_gt(
  yname = "applied",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dh %>% filter(top_50_simce == 1),

)

)

  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dh %>% filter(top_50_simce == 0),

  cband = TRUE
)

  xformla = ~num_students,

  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,

```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
means_tb <- cbind(
  dh %>%
    filter(in_sae == 1, year < year_first_sae, top_50_simce == 1) %>%
    summarise(
      "GPA T" = mean(prom_gral, na.rm = TRUE),
      "Average LM T" = mean(avg_lm, na.rm = TRUE),
      "Applied T" = mean(applied, na.rm = TRUE),
      "Assigned T" = mean(assigned, na.rm = TRUE),
      "Enrolled T" = mean(enrolled, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
  dh %>%
    filter(in_sae == 1, year < year_first_sae, top_50_simce == 0) %>%
    summarise(
      "GPA B" = mean(prom_gral, na.rm = TRUE),
      "Average LM B" = mean(avg_lm, na.rm = TRUE),
      "Applied B" = mean(applied, na.rm = TRUE),
      "Assigned B" = mean(assigned, na.rm = TRUE),
      "Enrolled B" = mean(enrolled, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
) %>% dplyr::select("GPA B", "GPA T", "Average LM B", "Average LM T", "Applied B", "Applied T", "Assigned B", "Assigned T", "Enrolled B", "Enrolled T")

obs_tb <- cbind(
  dh %>%
    filter(top_50_simce == 1) %>%
    summarise(
      "GPA T" = n(),
      "Average LM T" = n(),
      "Applied T" = n(),
      "Assigned T" = n(),
      "Enrolled T" = n()
    ),
  dh %>%
    filter(top_50_simce == 0) %>%
    summarise(
      "GPA B" = n(),
      "Average LM B" = n(),
      "Applied B" = n(),
      "Assigned B" = n(),
      "Enrolled B" = n()
    )
) %>% dplyr::select("GPA B", "GPA T", "Average LM B", "Average LM T", "Applied B", "Applied T", "Assigned B", "Assigned T", "Enrolled B", "Enrolled T")

models_tb <- list(
  "GPA B" = gpa_bot,
  "GPA T" = gpa_top,
  "Average LM B" = lm_bot,
  "Average LM T" = lm_top,
  "Applied B" = app_bot,
  "Applied T" = app_top,
  "Assigned B" = ass_bot,
  "Assigned T" = ass_top,
  "Enrolled B" = enr_bot,
  "Enrolled T" = enr_top
)

latex_code <- make_did_table(models_tb, means_pre = means_tb, obs = obs_tb)

cat(latex_code)
```


## Vulnerability of School
```{r ive, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
panel_ee <- readRDS("data/panel_ee_2004_2025.rds")
ive <- dr %>%
  dplyr::select(rbd, year, in_sae, cod_reg_rbd) %>%
  dplyr::filter(year == 2015, in_sae == 1) %>%
  left_join(panel_ee %>% filter(year == 2015) %>%
    dplyr::select(rbd, ive_sinae_media), by = "rbd") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(cod_reg_rbd) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    ive_p25 = quantile(ive_sinae_media, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    ive_p50 = quantile(ive_sinae_media, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE),
    ive_p75 = quantile(ive_sinae_media, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    ive_p90 = quantile(ive_sinae_media, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE),
    ive_p99 = quantile(ive_sinae_media, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    ive_q0 = ifelse(in_sae == 0 | is.na(ive_sinae_media), 1, 0),
    ive_q1 = ifelse(in_sae == 1 & !is.na(ive_sinae_media) & ive_sinae_media < ive_p25, 1, 0),
    ive_q2 = ifelse(in_sae == 1 & !is.na(ive_sinae_media) & ive_sinae_media >= ive_p25 & ive_sinae_media < ive_p50, 1, 0),
    ive_q3 = ifelse(in_sae == 1 & !is.na(ive_sinae_media) & ive_sinae_media >= ive_p50 & ive_sinae_media < ive_p75, 1, 0),
    ive_q4 = ifelse(in_sae == 1 & !is.na(ive_sinae_media) & ive_sinae_media >= ive_p75, 1, 0),
    ive_low = ifelse(in_sae == 1 & !is.na(ive_sinae_media) & ive_sinae_media & ive_sinae_media < ive_p50, 1, 0),
    ive_high = ifelse(in_sae == 1 & !is.na(ive_sinae_media) & ive_sinae_media & ive_sinae_media >= ive_p50, 1, 0),
  )

dv <- dr %>%
  left_join(ive %>% dplyr::select(-in_sae, -year, -cod_reg_rbd), by = "rbd") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0),
    ive_none = ifelse(is.na(ive_sinae_media) | is.na(ive_low) | is.na(ive_high), 1, 0)
  )
```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
gpa_low <- att_gt(
  yname = "prom_gral",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dv %>% filter(ive_none == 1 | ive_low == 1),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)


lm_low <- att_gt(
  yname = "avg_lm",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dv %>% filter(ive_none == 1 | ive_low == 1),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

app_low <- att_gt(
  yname = "applied",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dv %>% filter(ive_none == 1 | ive_low == 1),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

ass_low <- att_gt(
  yname = "assigned",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dv %>% filter(ive_none == 1 | ive_low == 1),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

enr_low <- att_gt(
  yname = "enrolled",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dv %>% filter(ive_none == 1 | ive_low == 1),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

means_low <- dv %>%
  filter(in_sae == 1, year < year_first_sae, ive_low == 1) %>%
  summarise(
    "GPA L" = mean(prom_gral, na.rm = TRUE),
    "Average LM L" = mean(avg_lm, na.rm = TRUE),
    "Applied L" = mean(applied, na.rm = TRUE),
    "Assigned L" = mean(assigned, na.rm = TRUE),
    "Enrolled L" = mean(enrolled, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

gpa_high <- att_gt(
  yname = "prom_gral",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dv %>% filter(ive_none == 1 | ive_high == 1),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)


lm_high <- att_gt(
  yname = "avg_lm",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dv %>% filter(ive_none == 1 | ive_high == 1),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

app_high <- att_gt(
  yname = "applied",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dv %>% filter(ive_none == 1 | ive_high == 1),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

ass_high <- att_gt(
  yname = "assigned",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dv %>% filter(ive_none == 1 | ive_high == 1),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

enr_high <- att_gt(
  yname = "enrolled",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dv %>% filter(ive_none == 1 | ive_high == 1),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

means_high <- dv %>%
  filter(in_sae == 1, year < year_first_sae, ive_high == 1) %>%
  summarise(
    "GPA H" = mean(prom_gral, na.rm = TRUE),
    "Average LM H" = mean(avg_lm, na.rm = TRUE),
    "Applied H" = mean(applied, na.rm = TRUE),
    "Assigned H" = mean(assigned, na.rm = TRUE),
    "Enrolled H" = mean(enrolled, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

means <- cbind(means_low, means_high) %>% dplyr::select("GPA L", "GPA H", "Average LM L", "Average LM H", "Applied L", "Applied H", "Assigned L", "Assigned H", "Enrolled L", "Enrolled H")


obs <- cbind(
  dv %>%
    filter(ive_none == 1 | ive_low == 1) %>%
    summarise(
      "GPA L" = n(),
      "Average LM L" = n(),
      "Applied L" = n(),
      "Assigned L" = n(),
      "Enrolled L" = n()
    ),
  dv %>%
    filter(ive_none == 1 | ive_high == 1) %>%
    summarise(
      "GPA H" = n(),
      "Average LM H" = n(),
      "Applied H" = n(),
      "Assigned H" = n(),
      "Enrolled H" = n()
    )
) %>% dplyr::select("GPA L", "GPA H", "Average LM L", "Average LM H", "Applied L", "Applied H", "Assigned L", "Assigned H", "Enrolled L", "Enrolled H")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
models_v <- list(
  "GPA L" = gpa_low,
  "GPA H" = gpa_high,
  "Average LM L" = lm_low,
  "Average LM H" = lm_high,
  "Applied L" = app_low,
  "Applied H" = app_high,
  "Assigned L" = ass_low,
  "Assigned H" = ass_high,
  "Enrolled L" = enr_low,
  "Enrolled H" = enr_high
)

latex_code <- make_did_table(models_v, means_pre = means, obs = obs)

cat(latex_code)
```

## Selectivity of Programs

```{r data_heterogeneity_selectivity, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# region Create_df_by_rbd
car <- readRDS("data/panel_programs_2012_2025.rds")

dh <- dsd %>%
  filter(year >= 2012) %>%
  left_join(
    car %>% dplyr::rename(
      year = YEAR,
      codigo_carrera_seleccion = codigo_demre
    ) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(num_seats_reg = VAC_1SEM + VAC_2SEM + SC_1SEM + SC_2SEM) %>%
      dplyr::select(codigo_carrera_seleccion, year, full_reg, starts_with("top") & ends_with("_reg")),
    by = c("codigo_carrera_seleccion", "year")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(nom_rbd) & is_private > -Inf) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    scored_lm = coalesce(scored_lm, 0),
    prom_gral = coalesce(prom_gral, 0),
    att = coalesce(att, 0),
    prom_lm_actual = coalesce(lm_pct, 0),
    applied = coalesce(applied, 0),
    assigned = coalesce(assigned, 0),
    enrolled = coalesce(enrolled, 0),
    assigned_full = coalesce(assigned * full_reg, 0),
    assigned_not_full = coalesce(assigned * (1 - full_reg), 0),
    assigned_top1 = coalesce(assigned * top1_reg, 0),
    assigned_top10 = coalesce(assigned * top10_reg, 0),
    assigned_top25 = coalesce(assigned * top25_reg, 0),
    assigned_top50 = coalesce(assigned * top50_reg, 0),
    assigned_top75 = coalesce(assigned * top75_reg, 0),
    assigned_top90 = coalesce(assigned * top90_reg, 0)
  ) %>%
  filter(year_start >= init_year & year_start <= end_year) %>%
  group_by(rbd, year_start) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    nom_rbd = first(nom_rbd),
    cod_reg_rbd = first(cod_reg_rbd),
    year_first_sae = min(rbd_first_sae),
    region_first_sae = min(region_first_sae),
    num_students = n_distinct(mrun),
    prom_gral = mean(prom_gral, na.rm = TRUE),
    att = mean(att, na.rm = TRUE),
    is_female = mean(is_female, na.rm = TRUE),
    is_low_income = mean(is_low_income, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_lm = mean(prom_lm_actual, na.rm = TRUE),
    scored_lm = mean(scored_lm, na.rm = TRUE),
    applied = mean(applied, na.rm = TRUE),
    assigned = mean(assigned, na.rm = TRUE),
    enrolled = mean(enrolled, na.rm = TRUE),
    assigned_full = mean(assigned_full, na.rm = TRUE),
    assigned_not_full = mean(assigned_not_full, na.rm = TRUE),
    assigned_top1 = mean(assigned_top1, na.rm = TRUE),
    assigned_top10 = mean(assigned_top10, na.rm = TRUE),
    assigned_top25 = mean(assigned_top25, na.rm = TRUE),
    assigned_top50 = mean(assigned_top50, na.rm = TRUE),
    assigned_top75 = mean(assigned_top75, na.rm = TRUE),
    assigned_top90 = mean(assigned_top90, na.rm = TRUE),
    is_private = max(is_private, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(year = year_start) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    treated = ifelse(year >= year_first_sae & year_first_sae < 2026, 1, 0),
    post_sae = ifelse(year >= region_first_sae, 1, 0),
    in_sae = ifelse(year_first_sae < 2026, 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  left_join(s %>% dplyr::select(-nom_rbd) %>% dplyr::mutate(in_simce = 1), by = c("rbd", "year")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    in_simce = coalesce(in_simce, 0),
    nalu_lect2m_rbd = coalesce(nalu_lect2m_rbd, 0),
    nalu_mate2m_rbd = coalesce(nalu_mate2m_rbd, 0),
    prom_lect2m_rbd = coalesce(prom_lect2m_rbd, 0),
    prom_mate2m_rbd = coalesce(prom_mate2m_rbd, 0),
    avg_lm_simce = (prom_lect2m_rbd + prom_mate2m_rbd) / 2
  ) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(is_private, -avg_lm_simce) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(rank_lm_simce = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0))
```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

  filter(in_sae == 1, year < year_first_sae) %>%
  summarise(

    `Full` = mean(assigned_full, na.rm = TRUE),
    `Not Full` = mean(assigned_not_full, na.rm = TRUE),

  summarise(
    `All` = n(),
    `Full` = n(),
    `Not Full` = n(),
    `Top 10` = n(),
    `Top 25` = n(),
    `Top 50` = n(),
    `Top 75` = n(),
    `Top 90` = n()
  )
```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
models_ass <- list(
  "All" = ass,

)

cat(latex_code)
```


# Robustness

## Parallel trends

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
make_eventstudy_table <- function(models,
                                  caption = "Event Study Estimates",
                                  label = "tab:event_study",
                                  digits = 3,
                                  ci_level = 0.99,
                                  include_pretrend = TRUE) {
  # ----------------------------
  # Use pre-computed aggte objects if passed, otherwise compute
  # (Re-computing calls bootstrap again, yielding different CIs)
  # ----------------------------
  if (inherits(models[[1]], "AGGTEobj")) {
    dyn_list <- models
  } else {
    dyn_list <- lapply(models, function(m) aggte(m, type = "dynamic"))
  }

  # ----------------------------
  # Collect all event times
  # ----------------------------
  all_egt <- sort(unique(unlist(lapply(dyn_list, function(x) x$egt))))

  k <- length(models)

  # Three rows per event time (coef + se + CI)
  coef_mat <- matrix("", nrow = length(all_egt) * 3, ncol = k)
  row_labels <- c()

  # ----------------------------
  # Fill coefficient matrix
  # ----------------------------
  for (i in seq_along(all_egt)) {
    e <- all_egt[i]
    row_labels <- c(
      row_labels,
      paste0("Event time ", e),
      "",
      ""
    )

    for (j in seq_along(dyn_list)) {
      dyn <- dyn_list[[j]]
      idx <- which(dyn$egt == e)

      if (length(idx) == 0) {
        coef_mat[(3 * i - 2):(3 * i), j] <- ""
      } else {
        att <- dyn$att.egt[idx]
        se <- dyn$se.egt[idx]

        # Use pointwise critical value based on ci_level
        crit_val <- qnorm(1 - (1 - ci_level) / 2)

        lower <- att - crit_val * se
        upper <- att + crit_val * se

        coef_mat[(3 * i - 2), j] <- sprintf(paste0("%.", digits, "f"), att)
        coef_mat[(3 * i - 1), j] <- sprintf(paste0("(%.", digits, "f)"), se)
        coef_mat[(3 * i), j] <- sprintf(paste0("[%.", digits, "f, %.", digits, "f]"), lower, upper)
      }
    }
  }

  # ----------------------------
  # Add pre-trend test (robust)
  # ----------------------------
  if (include_pretrend) {
    row_labels <- c(row_labels, "Pre-trend p-value")

    pvals <- sapply(dyn_list, function(x) {
      # Try the pre-trend Wald p-value; handle NULL / missing gracefully
      val <- x$Wpval
      if (is.null(val) || length(val) == 0) {
        # Recompute from pre-treatment coefficients if Wpval is missing
        pre_idx <- which(x$egt < 0)
        if (length(pre_idx) >= 1) {
          pre_att <- x$att.egt[pre_idx]
          pre_se <- x$se.egt[pre_idx]
          # Wald statistic: sum of (att/se)^2, chi-sq with df = # pre-periods
          W <- sum((pre_att / pre_se)^2, na.rm = TRUE)
          val <- 1 - pchisq(W, df = length(pre_idx))
        } else {
          val <- NA_real_
        }
      }
      as.numeric(val[1])
    })

    coef_mat <- rbind(
      coef_mat,
      sprintf(paste0("%.", digits, "f"), pvals)
    )
  }

  # ----------------------------
  # Column headers
  # ----------------------------
  col_header <- paste(names(models), collapse = " & ")
  col_numbers <- paste0("(", 1:k, ")", collapse = " & ")

  # ----------------------------
  # Build table body
  # ----------------------------
  body_rows <- ""
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(coef_mat))) {
    body_rows <- paste0(
      body_rows,
      "      ", row_labels[i], " & ",
      paste(coef_mat[i, ], collapse = " & "),
      "\\\\\n"
    )
  }

  # ----------------------------
  # Build LaTeX table
  # ----------------------------
  latex_table <- paste0(
    "\\begin{table}[htbp]\n",
    "   \\caption{", caption, "}\\label{", label, "}\n",
    "   \\bigskip\n",
    "   \\centering\n",
    "   \\begin{tabular}{l", paste(rep("c", k), collapse = ""), "}\n",
    "      \\toprule\n",
    "                   & ", col_header, "\\\\\n",
    "                   & ", col_numbers, "\\\\\n",
    "      \\midrule\n",
    body_rows,
    "      \\bottomrule\n",
    "   \\end{tabular}\n",
    "\\end{table}"
  )

  return(latex_table)
}
```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
gpa <- att_gt(
  yname = "prom_gral",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dr %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE,
  control_group = "notyettreated", # key for your question
  est_method = "dr" # doubly robust (recommended)
)

lm <- att_gt(
  yname = "avg_lm",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dr %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE,
  control_group = "notyettreated", # key for your question
  est_method = "dr" # doubly robust (recommended)
)


app <- att_gt(
  yname = "applied",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dr %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE,
  control_group = "notyettreated", # key for your question
  est_method = "dr" # doubly robust (recommended)
)

ass <- att_gt(
  yname = "assigned",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dr %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE,
  control_group = "notyettreated", # key for your question

)

enr <- att_gt(
  yname = "enrolled",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "year_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dr %>% dplyr::mutate(year_first_sae = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae, 0)),
  clustervars = clustering_var,

  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE,
  control_group = "notyettreated", # key for your question
  est_method = "dr" # doubly robust (recommended)
)

dyn_gpa <- aggte(gpa, type = "dynamic")
dyn_lm <- aggte(lm, type = "dynamic")
dyn_app <- aggte(app, type = "dynamic")
dyn_ass <- aggte(ass, type = "dynamic")
dyn_enr <- aggte(enr, type = "dynamic")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Variant: report Point Estimates (+ stars) per event time (no CIs)
make_eventstudy_table_pe <- function(models,
                                     caption = "Event Study Point Estimates",
                                     label = "tab:event_study_pe",
                                     digits = 3,
                                     include_pretrend = TRUE) {
  # Accept either pre-computed AGGTEobjs or raw att_gt objects
  if (inherits(models[[1]], "AGGTEobj")) {
    dyn_list <- models
  } else {
    dyn_list <- lapply(models, function(m) aggte(m, type = "dynamic"))
  }

  # Collect all event times
  all_egt <- sort(unique(unlist(lapply(dyn_list, function(x) x$egt))))
  k <- length(models)

  # Two rows per event time: estimate (with stars) and se
  coef_mat <- matrix("", nrow = length(all_egt) * 2, ncol = k)
  row_labels <- c()

  # Extract stars from summary(AGGTEobj) to match printed output
  summaries <- lapply(dyn_list, function(d) capture.output(summary(d)))

  for (i in seq_along(all_egt)) {
    e <- all_egt[i]
    row_labels <- c(row_labels, paste0("Event time ", e), "")

    for (j in seq_along(dyn_list)) {
      dyn <- dyn_list[[j]]
      idx <- which(dyn$egt == e)
      if (length(idx) == 0) {
        coef_mat[(2 * i - 1):(2 * i), j] <- ""
      } else {
        att <- dyn$att.egt[idx]
        se <- dyn$se.egt[idx]
        # Find the corresponding line in the summary output and extract any trailing stars
        summ_lines <- summaries[[j]]
        # Lines with event estimates usually start with the event number (possibly padded)
        pattern <- paste0("^\\s*", e, "\\b")
        match_line <- summ_lines[grepl(pattern, summ_lines)]
        if (length(match_line) >= 1) {
          line <- match_line[1]
          star_matches <- regmatches(line, gregexpr("\\*+", line))[[1]]
          stars <- if (length(star_matches) >= 1) paste0(star_matches, collapse = "") else ""
        } else {
          stars <- ""
        }
        # Format estimate; if significant (had stars in summary) wrap in \textbf{}
        est_txt <- sprintf(paste0("%.", digits, "f"), att)
        if (nzchar(stars)) {
          est_txt <- paste0("\\textbf{", est_txt, "}")
        }
        coef_mat[(2 * i - 1), j] <- est_txt
        coef_mat[(2 * i), j] <- sprintf(paste0("(%.", digits, "f)"), se)
      }
    }
  }

  # Pre-trend p-value row
  if (include_pretrend) {
    row_labels <- c(row_labels, "Pre-trend p-value")
    pvals <- sapply(dyn_list, function(x) {
      val <- x$Wpval
      if (is.null(val) || length(val) == 0) {
        pre_idx <- which(x$egt < 0)
        if (length(pre_idx) >= 1) {
          pre_att <- x$att.egt[pre_idx]
          pre_se <- x$se.egt[pre_idx]
          W <- sum((pre_att / pre_se)^2, na.rm = TRUE)
          val <- 1 - pchisq(W, df = length(pre_idx))
        } else {
          val <- NA_real_
        }
      }
      as.numeric(val[1])
    })
    coef_mat <- rbind(coef_mat, sprintf(paste0("%.", digits, "f"), pvals))
  }

  col_header <- paste(names(models), collapse = " & ")
  col_numbers <- paste0("(", 1:k, ")", collapse = " & ")

  body_rows <- ""
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(coef_mat))) {
    body_rows <- paste0(
      body_rows,
      "      ", row_labels[i], " & ",
      paste(coef_mat[i, ], collapse = " & "),
      "\\\\\n"
    )
  }

  latex_table <- paste0(
    "\\begin{table}[htbp]\n",
    "   \\caption{", caption, "}\\label{", label, "}\n",
    "   \\bigskip\n",
    "   \\centering\n",
    "   \\begin{tabular}{l", paste(rep("c", k), collapse = ""), "}\n",
    "      \\toprule\n",
    "                   & ", col_header, "\\\\\n",
    "                   & ", col_numbers, "\\\\\n",
    "      \\midrule\n",
    body_rows,
    "      \\bottomrule\n",
    "   \\end{tabular}\n",
    "\\end{table}"
  )

  return(latex_table)
}
```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
# Pass the pre-computed aggte objects (not raw att_gt models)
dyn_models_list <- list(
  GPA = dyn_gpa,
  "Average LM" = dyn_lm,
  Applied = dyn_app,
  Assigned = dyn_ass,
  Enrolled = dyn_enr
)

# latex_code <- make_eventstudy_table(dyn_models_list, ci_level=0.95)
latex_code <- make_eventstudy_table_pe(dyn_models_list)

cat(latex_code)
```



## Placebo test
### Moving treatment year
```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
outcomes <- c(
  "prom_gral",
  "avg_lm",
  "applied",
  "assigned",
  "enrolled"
)

formulas <- lapply(outcomes, function(y) {
  as.formula(paste0(y, " ~ treated + num_students | rbd + year"))
})
names(formulas) <- outcomes

build_placebo_data <- function(shifter, truncation_year = 2015) {
  out <- dsd %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      scored_lm = coalesce(scored_lm, 0),
      prom_gral = coalesce(prom_gral, 0),
      att = coalesce(att, 0),
      prom_lm_actual = coalesce(lm_pct, 0),
      applied = coalesce(applied, 0),
      assigned = coalesce(assigned, 0),
      enrolled = coalesce(enrolled, 0)
    ) %>%
    filter(year_start >= init_year & year_start <= truncation_year) %>% # ensures no true treatment enters placebo post
    group_by(rbd, year_start) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      year_first_sae = min(rbd_first_sae),
      region_first_sae = min(region_first_sae),
      num_students = n_distinct(mrun),
      prom_gral = mean(prom_gral, na.rm = TRUE),
      att = mean(att, na.rm = TRUE),
      is_female = mean(is_female, na.rm = TRUE),
      is_low_income = mean(is_low_income, na.rm = TRUE),
      avg_lm = mean(prom_lm_actual, na.rm = TRUE),
      scored_lm = mean(scored_lm, na.rm = TRUE),
      applied = mean(applied, na.rm = TRUE),
      assigned = mean(assigned, na.rm = TRUE),
      enrolled = mean(enrolled, na.rm = TRUE),
      # is_private = max(is_private, na.rm = TRUE)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::rename(year = year_start) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      treated = ifelse(year >= year_first_sae - shifter &
        year_first_sae < 2026, 1, 0),
      post_sae = ifelse(year >= region_first_sae, 1, 0),
      in_sae = ifelse(year_first_sae < 2026, 1, 0)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(s %>% mutate(in_simce = 1), by = c("rbd", "year")) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      in_simce = coalesce(in_simce, 0),
      nalu_lect2m_rbd = coalesce(nalu_lect2m_rbd, 0),
      nalu_mate2m_rbd = coalesce(nalu_mate2m_rbd, 0),
      prom_lect2m_rbd = coalesce(prom_lect2m_rbd, 0),
      prom_mate2m_rbd = coalesce(prom_mate2m_rbd, 0)
    )
  return(out)
}

run_placebo_models <- function(shifter, truncation_year = 2015) {
  dp <- build_placebo_data(shifter, truncation_year)

  map_df(names(formulas), function(outcome) {
    fml <- formulas[[outcome]]

    # SIMCE outcomes need in_simce == 1
    data_use <- if (outcome %in% c("prom_lect2m_rbd", "prom_mate2m_rbd")) {
      dp %>% filter(in_simce == 1)
    } else {
      dp
    }

    # Create a placebo group timing variable by shifting the observed first-treatment year
    data_use2 <- data_use %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        year_first_sae_placebo = ifelse(in_sae == 1, year_first_sae - shifter, 0)
      )

    # Estimate using the did package (Callaway & Sant'Anna)
    est <- att_gt(
      yname = outcome,
      tname = "year",
      idname = "rbd",
      gname = "year_first_sae_placebo",
      xformla = ~num_students,
      data = data_use2,
      clustervars = clustering_var,
      panel = TRUE,
      bstrap = TRUE,
      biters = 10000,
      cband = TRUE
    )

    # Aggregate to overall ATT (simple) and extract coef/se
    agg <- aggte(est, type = "simple")
    coef_att <- as.numeric(agg$overall.att)
    se_att <- as.numeric(agg$overall.se)
    pval_att <- 2 * pnorm(-abs(coef_att / se_att))

    tibble(
      shifter = shifter,
      outcome = outcome,
      coef = coef_att,
      p_value = pval_att,
      se = se_att
    )
  })
}
```


```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
shifters <- 1:5
placebo_results <- map_df(shifters, run_placebo_models)
actual_results <- run_placebo_models(0, end_year)

pretty_labels <- c(
  prom_gral = "GPA",
  avg_lm = "Avg. Math-Verbal",
  applied = "Applied",
  assigned = "Assigned",
  enrolled = "Enrolled"
)

placebo_results <- placebo_results %>%
  mutate(outcome = factor(outcome, levels = outcomes, labels = pretty_labels))

actual_results <- actual_results %>%
  mutate(outcome = factor(outcome, levels = outcomes, labels = pretty_labels))
```

```{r plot_placebo_shifter, eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width=6,fig.height=4, fig.align="center", fig.cap="Payoffs", fig.pos="H"}
ggplot(placebo_results, aes(x = outcome, y = coef)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.3, color = "steelblue4") +
  geom_point(
    data = actual_results,
    aes(x = outcome, y = coef),
    color = "firebrick4", alpha = 0.7, size = 3
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = actual_results,
    aes(
      x = as.numeric(outcome) - 0.4,
      xend = as.numeric(outcome) + 0.4,
      y = coef, yend = coef
    ),
    color = "firebrick4", alpha = 0.7, linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_linerange(
    data = actual_results,
    aes(x = outcome, ymin = coef - se, ymax = coef + se),
    color = "firebrick4", alpha = 0.7, linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    x = "Outcome",
    y = "Estimated Effect"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1))
```

### Analysis only considering private schools

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
gpa <- att_gt(
  yname = "prom_gral",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "region_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dr %>% filter(is_private == 1),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

lm <- att_gt(
  yname = "avg_lm",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "region_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dr %>% filter(is_private == 1),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)


app <- att_gt(
  yname = "applied",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "region_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dr %>% filter(is_private == 1),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

ass <- att_gt(
  yname = "assigned",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "region_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dr %>% filter(is_private == 1),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)

enr <- att_gt(
  yname = "enrolled",
  tname = "year",
  idname = "rbd",
  gname = "region_first_sae",
  xformla = ~num_students,
  data = dr %>% filter(is_private == 1),
  clustervars = clustering_var,
  panel = TRUE,
  bstrap = TRUE,
  biters = 10000,
  cband = TRUE
)
```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
models_list <- list(
  GPA = gpa,
  "Average LM" = lm,
  Applied = app,
  Assigned = ass,
  Enrolled = enr
)

# compute pre-treatment means among treated private schools
means_pre_private <- dr %>%
  filter(is_private == 1, year < region_first_sae) %>%
  summarise(
    GPA = mean(prom_gral, na.rm = TRUE),
    "Average LM" = mean(avg_lm, na.rm = TRUE),
    Applied = mean(applied, na.rm = TRUE),
    Assigned = mean(assigned, na.rm = TRUE),
    Enrolled = mean(enrolled, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

obs_private <- dr %>%
  filter(is_private == 1) %>%
  summarise(
    GPA = n(),
    "Average LM" = n(),
    Applied = n(),
    Assigned = n(),
    Enrolled = n()
  )

latex_code <- make_did_table(models_list, means_pre = means_pre_private, obs = obs_private)

cat(latex_code)
```


## Two-way fixed effects model

```{r staggered_did_estimation, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# sim_lec <- feols(prom_lect2m_rbd ~ treated + num_students | rbd + year , data = dr %>% filter(in_simce == 1), vcov = clustering_strategy)
# sim_mat <- feols(prom_mate2m_rbd ~ treated + num_students | rbd + year , data = dr %>% filter(in_simce == 1), vcov = clustering_strategy)
# att <- feols(att ~ treated + num_students | rbd + year , data = dr, vcov = clustering_strategy)
gpa <- feols(prom_gral ~ treated + num_students | rbd + year, data = dr, vcov = clustering_strategy)
lm <- feols(avg_lm ~ treated + num_students | rbd + year, data = dr, vcov = clustering_strategy)
app <- feols(applied ~ treated + num_students | rbd + year, data = dr, vcov = clustering_strategy)
ass <- feols(assigned ~ treated + num_students | rbd + year, data = dr, vcov = clustering_strategy)
enr <- feols(enrolled ~ treated + num_students | rbd + year, data = dr, vcov = clustering_strategy)
```

```{r staggered_did_table, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
st <- style.tex("aer")

# rename fixed-effect labels
st$fixef.suffix <- "" # remove "fixed effects"
st$fixef.prefix <- "" # remove prefix
st$fixef.names <- c("RBD", "Year")

out <- capture.output(
  etable(
    list(gpa, lm, app, ass, enr),
    # --- LaTeX output ---
    tex = TRUE,
    style.tex = st,
    #
    #   # rename regressors
    dict = c(
      "treated" = "Treated",
      # "prom_lect2m_rbd" = "Verbal",
      # "prom_mate2m_rbd" = "Math",
      # "att"             = "Attendance",
      "prom_gral" = "GPA",
      "avg_lm" = "Average LM",
      "applied" = "Applied",
      "assigned" = "Assigned",
      "enrolled" = "Enrolled"
      # "num_students" = "Num. Students"
    ),
    #
    #   # numeric formatting
    digits = 3, # valid
    #   # no scientific notation: handled by digits + fixest default
    #
    #   # keep only Observations
    fitstat = ~n,
    #
    drop = c("num_students"),
    # wrap in table environment
    title = "Regression Results",
    label = "tab:reg_results"
  )
)

# Replace hlines with booktabs rules
# out <- clean_etable(out, header = " & \\multicolumn{2}{c}{Project} \\\\ \n \\cmidrule(lr){2-3} ")
writeLines(out, "tables/twfe_sae_on_outcomes.tex")
```

\input{tables/twfe_sae_on_outcomes.tex}


# Map
```{r map, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(sf)

# 1. Load the Chile map
chile_map <- st_read("plots/cl.json")

# 2. SAE adoption data (keyed by ISO 3166-2 region codes used in the GeoJSON)
#    Traditional Chilean numbering: 1=I(Tarapacá) ... 13=RM ... 15=XV(Arica) 16=XVI(Ñuble)
sae_year <- data.frame(
  id = c(
    "CLTA", # 1  Tarapacá            (I)
    "CLAN", # 2  Antofagasta         (II)
    "CLAT", # 3  Atacama             (III)
    "CLCO", # 4  Coquimbo            (IV)
    "CLVS", # 5  Valparaíso          (V)
    "CLLI", # 6  O'Higgins           (VI)
    "CLML", # 7  Maule               (VII)
    "CLBI", # 8  Bío-Bío             (VIII)
    "CLAR", # 9  La Araucanía        (IX)
    "CLLL", # 10 Los Lagos           (X)
    "CLAI", # 11 Aysén               (XI)
    "CLMA", # 12 Magallanes          (XII)
    "CLRM", # 13 Metropolitana       (RM)
    "CLLR", # 14 Los Ríos            (XIV)
    "CLAP", # 15 Arica y Parinacota  (XV)
    "CLNB"
  ), # 16 Ñuble               (XVI)
  year = c(
    2017, 2018, 2018, 2017, 2018, 2017, 2018, 2018,
    2018, 2017, 2018, 2016, 2019, 2018, 2018, 2018
  )
)
# 3. Merge map with SAE data
chile_map <- chile_map %>%
  left_join(sae_year, by = "id")

# 5. Rotate Chile 90° clockwise so north is at the left and south at the right
rotation_matrix <- matrix(c(0, -1, 1, 0), nrow = 2) # 90° CW rotation
chile_map_rot <- chile_map
chile_map_rot$geometry <- chile_map_rot$geometry * rotation_matrix

p <- ggplot(chile_map_rot) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = factor(year)), color = "black", size = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_grey(
    start = 0.9, end = 0.2,
    name = "SAE adoption year"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )

# 6. Save to PDF
ggsave(
  "sae_chile_map.pdf",
  plot = p,
  width = 12,
  height = 3
)
```
